# Decisions Log

> Append-only ADR-lite. One decision per section. Latest at the bottom.

## 2026-05-04 — Use single repo (phase=spec)

**Context:** Discussion of monorepo vs multi-repo at the spec phase.

**Decision:** Single repo wins for now.

**Consequences:** Easier cross-cutting refactors, harder to spin out subprojects.

**Alternatives considered:** Polyrepo (rejected — premature).
